mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_email, u.nickname, p.category_code, p.title, p.content, p.del_yn, p.created_at, p.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_code = '01' AND l.target_id = p.post_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.post_id AND c.del_yn = 'N') AS comment_count FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_email = u.email WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (target_code, target_id, user_email) VALUES ('01', #{postId}, #{userEmail})
INSERT INTO reports ( target_code, target_id, reporter_email, reason_code, report_status_code ) VALUES ( #{targetCode}, #{targetId}, #{reporterEmail}, #{reasonCode}, '01' )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_EMAIL FROM posts WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
